calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Unity Homes Inc. is present. Represented by Phyllis Freedman.
Attorney, Saul Ferster, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Bridgette Brown, is present.
Attorney, Shawn O'Leary, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUL-12-2010 is vacated.
